3331290.name: TRASHWORLD CHAOS
3331290.description:
Step into a bizarre and grotesque world where chaos reigns and monstrous creatures clash in epic battles. In this thrilling multiplayer experience, you’ll choose from a roster of unique and eccentric characters, each with their own skills and quirks, to dominate your foes in the ultimate showdown of strange.

Features:

  • Grotesque World: Immerse yourself in a surreal environment filled with twisted landscapes and jaw-dropping creatures. The unsettling beauty of this world will keep you on edge as you fight for survival.

  • Diverse Characters: Select from a variety of outlandish characters, each offering distinct playstyles and abilities. Experiment with different strategies to find your perfect fit.

  • Team-Based Mayhem: Join forces with up to 7 other players in team-based matches. Work together to outsmart your enemies or dive into chaotic free-for-all battles for ultimate bragging rights.

  • Multiplayer Madness: Whether you prefer close-quarters combat, ranged attacks, or using the environment to your advantage, the dynamic multiplayer gameplay ensures no two matches are the same.

Are you ready to embrace the absurd and prove your skills in a world unlike any other? Prepare for unforgettable battles where only the weirdest will survive!
3331290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
